title.en: Suddenly, the Heaven Splitting Sword couldn't e...

content.en:
Although Ye Tian could crush the Dao Strange Thing Heaven Splitting Sword, if he wanted to kill the other party, a duplicate body was undoubtedly not enough.

As a result, he besieged multiple replica bodies together, and the Sky Splitting Sword was sure to die.

The dense Supreme Dao Extreme Spear Technique killed the Supreme Dao Strange Thing Sky Splitting Sword, plus other copies of the body to cast restricted Supreme Dao Divine Powers and various means to suppress the Supreme Dao Strange Thing Sky Splitting Sword.

Suddenly, the Heaven Splitting Sword couldn't even escape.

Rumble!!!!

The Sky Splitting Sword was hit, and cracks appeared on it.

Gradually, there were more and more cracks on it, and they were finally shattered by Ye Tian.

At this time, the strange humanoid figure dissipated, and the core fragment of the Sky Splitting Sword was grabbed by Ye Tian.

"Another Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule item, better than the Xuanying Drum Fragment!"

Ye Tian smiled, this eighth sequence supreme dao rule item was enough to make his eighth sequence supreme dao rule continue to improve a bit.

"It's still not very easy to kill the Dao Strange Thing now, and you have to create the eighth sequence of the Dao Divine Power as soon as possible!"

In the years that followed, Ye Tian worked hard to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao, and at the same time worked hard to create the eighth sequence of the Supreme Dao Divine Power.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian was also trying to find a Dao Strange Thing, but it would take a long time to find a Dao Strange Thing.

Before I knew it, another thirty years had passed.

At this time, he had only killed six Supreme Dao Strange Objects, and it was difficult to encounter Supreme Dao Strange Objects again.

He understood that those supreme strange things were originally rules, and they were naturally able to sense certain dangers, so as to avoid him.

Unless he had a way to find the Dao Strange Things, it was almost unrealistic to hunt a large number of the Dao Strange Things.

"Taisu Palace may have a way to find the most Taoist curiosity!"

Ye Tian guessed.

After all, Taisu Palace's understanding of the Dao Strange Things is far from being comparable to him, just like Miao'an's scroll, which can be expelled to the Dao Strange Things, he can't do it now, and he doesn't know what that scroll is, and how to make the Dao Strange Things retreat.

However, Taisu Palace only recruits women to the Dao realm, and the requirements are very high, he estimates that he can only enter Tai Su Wei, but Tai Su Wei is very strict about the origin, and his real body copy body must not be eligible to be selected.

"Forget it, for the time being, these Eighth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items are enough!" Ye Tian thought.

......

Taixuan Ancient Capital.

Ye Tian received a notice that it was summoned to him by several other elders of the True River Valley.

"True River Valley was abandoned by Taisu Palace!"

Ye Tian had long known that there would be such a result, but he didn't expect it to come so quickly.

The True River Valley Lord of the True River Valley has fallen, and the True Yang has also fallen, and the connection with the Taisu Palace is gone, plus the True River Valley has fallen many elders in the Xuanlin Mountain Realm before, and now there are only a few elders supporting it, and it is not even a small force.

The most important point is that the real river valley has not been supplied with resources for a long time.

Before, Zhenhe Valley provided some resources to Taisu Palace every long time, and only then did it obtain the blessing of Taisu Palace.

But over the years, the True River Valley has become more and more difficult, and many True River Valley disciples have run away, causing the True River Valley to decline more and more, how can there be any resources to supply Taisu Palace!

Therefore, Taisu Palace gave up the True River Valley.

"It's strange, Zhenyang was killed, but Miao An didn't react at all?"

Ye Tian was puzzled by this.

After he killed Zhenyang, he thought that Miao An would appear, or send other Dao Realms to investigate, but there was nothing.

It stands to reason that Miao An has been in contact with Zhenyang for so long, why hasn't he contacted Zhenyang once? If he contacts him once, he will know that something is wrong.

Of course, Ye Tian didn't care too much.

Anyway, it's been so long, and even if Miao An appears, he can't find anything.

......

Taixuan Ancient Capital.

At an auction, Ye Tian encountered a good supreme path formation.

This set of supreme dao formations is called the Taiguang Domain Creation Array, which can restore the origin of certain origin realms, worlds or special places, which is not too powerful a formation, but because of its particularity, its value is not low.

Any Supreme Dao Realm can comprehend this set of Taiguang Domain Creation Array, but if it is urged, it must also be carried out by the Supreme Dao Realm, because this formation needs to be promoted by the Supreme Dao rules, otherwise it will not be able to be urged.

Ye Tian had participated in auctions of this grade many times, but it was the first time he had encountered a formation that he needed very much.

"The Taiguang Domain Creation Array has helped a lot in the land of the Eternal Shore, the Infinite Heavenly Palace has extracted the origin of the Origin Realm, if you want to recover it, it will take too many years, even now, it has not recovered much. "

Therefore, he decided to bid for this set of Taiguang Domain Creation Array.

In the end, he spent millions of Zhidao coins to bid for it.

In this auction, Ye Tian only auctioned this one item, and the other items were of little use to him, and he couldn't look down on them.

After leaving the auction, Ye Tian began to study the Taiguang Domain Creation Array.

After reading it, he frowned slightly.

"The formation is very good, but if you want to build this Taiguang Domain Creation Array, the Reincarnation Domain and the Eternal Beyond Land can't get all the materials together. Ye Tian said darkly.

After all, some materials are resources that can only be born in the Infinite Domain, and he can buy resources in the Taixuan Gu, but he can't send them to the land of eternity!

The land of eternity.

Ye Tian's gaze passed through the Origin Realm barrier and saw a group of Supreme Dao Realms outside the Origin Realm.

With his eighth sequence to the realm of Dao rules, he spied on this group of guys, and they couldn't find it.

Although this group of Supreme Dao Realm was very weak, and the most powerful one was only the second to the Dao Realm, he couldn't make a move, otherwise he would be known by the Infinite Heavenly Palace that he was still alive.

Therefore, he could not send the material to the land of eternity.

"You can only build a low-level version of the Taiguang Domain Creation Array!"

Ye Tian muttered.

With his realm, it is not too difficult to slightly replace it with other materials and create a low-profile version of the Taiguang Domain Creation Array.

So, in the following days, he began to try to create a low-profile version of the Taiguang Domain Creation Array.

The years passed.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

On this day, Ye Tian successfully transformed the Taiguang Domain Creation Array, which was a low-end version, and the materials needed could be found in the Land of Eternity, the Ruins of Reincarnation, and the Reincarnation Domain.

So, it took him a little time to get enough materials together.

Then, he began to build a low-level version of the Taiguang Domain Creation Array in the land of Eternity.

Once this formation is completed, it can restore the origin of the land beyond eternity, and even surpass the past.

At that time, the land on the other side of eternity may transcend the reincarnation realm and become the core territory of this origin realm.
